## Source: ossf-package-analysis (3bf2f306b84f7eb14895a384ef60bd0003460991e0e370d53caf4c3dee84fe24)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'yelp-mobile-site-common' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
